channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Graham Platner drops his bid for Senate after facing an allegation of rape
item.description: Platner's campaign to unseat GOP Sen. Susan Collins in Maine was marked by repeated scandals. It came to a crashing halt after the allegation led top Democrats to withdraw their support.
item.content:encoded:
Platner's campaign to unseat GOP Sen. Susan Collins in Maine was marked by repeated scandals. It came to a crashing halt after the allegation led top Democrats to withdraw their support.

(Image credit: CJ Gunther)
item.dc:creator: Barbara Sprunt

item.title: ICE agents shot and killed a Houston man during a traffic stop. Here's what we know
item.description: Family and immigration advocate organizations are calling for a full and independent investigation into a shooting in which ICE agents shot and killed a Houston man during a traffic stop.
item.content:encoded: Family and immigration advocate organizations are calling for a full and independent investigation into a shooting in which ICE agents shot and killed a Houston man during a traffic stop.
item.dc:creator: Bianca Seward

item.title: We break down the nominations, snubs and surprises of the 2026 Emmy nominations
item.description: Two HBO Max shows emerged as the most recognized series in the 78th Emmy award nominations announced Wednesday. Hacks was the most nominated comedy and The Pitt was the most-nominated drama.
item.content:encoded: Two HBO Max shows emerged as the most recognized series in the 78th Emmy award nominations announced Wednesday. Hacks was the most nominated comedy and The Pitt was the most-nominated drama.
item.dc:creator: Eric Deggans

item.title: A new proposal for organ donation sparks concern
item.description: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by having their vital organs removed for donation? The ethical concerns are substantial.
item.content:encoded: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by having their vital organs removed for donation? The ethical concerns are substantial.
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein

item.title: Why it's hard for the World Cup's aging stars to hang up their cleats
item.description: How old is too old to play in a World Cup? Age has been a point of discussion in this Cup, with legends like Cristiano Ronaldo playing at age 41, and Lionel Messi at 39.
item.content:encoded: How old is too old to play in a World Cup? Age has been a point of discussion in this Cup, with legends like Cristiano Ronaldo playing at age 41, and Lionel Messi at 39.
item.dc:creator: Jasmine Garsd

item.title: A $5,000 fine for former Milwaukee judge convicted of obstructing an immigration arrest
item.description: Former Milwaukee County Circuit Court Judge Hannah Dugan appeared in federal court for sentencing. She was convicted of obstructing ICE agents as they tried to arrest an undocumented immigrant.
item.content:encoded: Former Milwaukee County Circuit Court Judge Hannah Dugan appeared in federal court for sentencing. She was convicted of obstructing ICE agents as they tried to arrest an undocumented immigrant.

item.title: One of the country's oldest opera companies premieres its' Black Opera Project
item.description: There have been Black composers and Black storylines in opera, but they've often failed to gain traction with performing companies and audiences. This summer, Cincinnati Opera seeks to change that.
item.content:encoded: There have been Black composers and Black storylines in opera, but they've often failed to gain traction with performing companies and audiences. This summer, Cincinnati Opera seeks to change that.
item.dc:creator: Tana Weingartner

item.title: Ohio entrepreneur wants to bring 'farm-to-table' concept to clothing industry
item.description: The farm-to-table movement has been around for decades. An Ohio entrepreneur wants to replicate its success with clothing by building a regional textile economy.
item.content:encoded: The farm-to-table movement has been around for decades. An Ohio entrepreneur wants to replicate its success with clothing by building a regional textile economy.
item.dc:creator: Amanda Pirani

item.title: Young people are flocking to estate sales
item.description: Younger Americans are flocking to estate sales. Social media means a whole new set of buyers, and a new way to spend a day out with friends.
item.content:encoded: Younger Americans are flocking to estate sales. Social media means a whole new set of buyers, and a new way to spend a day out with friends.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Kurzius

item.title: Former Maine official considers how to replace Platner
item.description: NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Nirav Shah, a former Democratic gubernatorial candidate in Maine, about what's next following Graham Platner's expected departure from the state's U.S. Senate race.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Nirav Shah, a former Democratic gubernatorial candidate in Maine, about what's next following Graham Platner's expected departure from the state's U.S. Senate race.
item.dc:creator: Tyler Bartlam
